patch.insert_text: Naproxen 220 mg oral tablet, one with breakfast as needed for knee pain, taken with food.
added_claims: Patient takes naproxen 220 mg orally, one tablet with breakfast as needed for knee pain

reasons: Insertion is supported: transcript confirms naproxen 220 mg, one with breakfast (with food), for knee pain that it 'settles'; PRN framing is a reasonable reflection of the patient's self-directed use
Adds new medication information; the note previously listed 'Medications: none,' so this corrects/updates rather than duplicates
Medications are appropriately documented in the Subjective section

patch.insert_text: Naproxen 220 mg oral tablet, one with breakfast as needed for knee pain, taken with food (some weeks none)
added_claims: Patient takes naproxen 220 mg orally, one tablet with breakfast as needed for knee pain

reasons: Naproxen 220 mg, one with breakfast, for knee pain, and 'with food' (implied by breakfast) are supported by the evidence span.
The claim 'some weeks patient takes none' is not supported anywhere in the evidence.
Not redundant: the note currently lists 'Medications: none,' so this adds new information.
Subjective is an appropriate section for patient-reported medication use.
